description: Sign XML documents or strings with digital certificates using asymmetric cryptography. Create signer/verifier objects and verify signed documents.

methods.name: createSigner
methods.description: Creates a Signer object for signing plain strings with a digital certificate.

params.name: options.certId
params.description: The script ID of the certificate

methods.name: createVerifier
methods.description: Creates a Verifier object for verifying signatures of plain strings.

params.name: options.certId
params.description: The script ID of the certificate

methods.name: signXml
methods.description: Signs an XML string using the specified certificate and returns a SignedXml object.

params.name: options.certId
params.description: The script ID of the certificate

params.name: options.rootTag
params.description: The root element tag to sign

methods.name: verifyXmlSignature
methods.description: Verifies the signature of a signed XML document.

params.name: options.signedXml
params.description: The signed XML file to verify

params.name: options.certId
params.description: The script ID of the certificate

params.name: options.rootTag
params.description: The root element tag that was signed

enums.name: HashAlg
enums.description: Hash algorithm types for signing and verification.

objectTypes.name: Signer
objectTypes.description: Signs plain strings using a digital certificate.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates the input string to be signed.

methods.name: sign
methods.description: Produces the signature and returns it.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates the string to verify against the certificate.

methods.name: verify
methods.description: Verifies the string against a provided signature.

objectTypes.name: SignedXml
objectTypes.description: Represents an XML string that has been digitally signed.

methods.name: asString
methods.description: Returns the signed XML as a string.

methods.name: asFile
methods.description: Returns the signed XML as a file.File object.

methods.name: asXml
methods.description: Returns the signed XML as an xml.Document.
